top_signals.title: CoreLogic Wraps Up $5.25 Billion Debt Deal With Hefty Yields
top_signals.summary: CoreLogic Inc. raised $5.25 billion from a debt sale after amending the terms and offering some of the year’s highest yields in response to lukewarm investor demand.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Bank of America taps new leaders to bridge crypto, AI and traditional finance
top_signals.summary: Sonali Theisen was named head of BofA's global digital assets platform, while Kevin Milsom was tapped to serve as head of AI transformation
top_signals.why_it_matters: Digital asset volatility and institutional crypto positioning changes.
